heading: Dividends
label: 2125 Dividends
text: Dividends may be payable only on nonvoting investment stock, if declared by the board of directors of the bank, subject to the general direction of the Farm Credit Administration.
notes: Amendments1988— struck out “other than stock held by the Farm Credit Administration,” after “investment stock,”.Pub. L. 100–2331985— struck out “the Governor of” before “the Farm Credit Administration” and inserted “, subject to the general direction of the Farm Credit Administration”.Pub. L. 99–205
Effective Date of 1985 AmendmentAmendment by effective thirty days after , see , set out as a note under .Pub. L. 99–205section 401 of Pub. L. 99–205section 2001 of this titleDec. 23, 1985
